name: milesight_iot_am308
description: Milesight AM308 collects various indoor ambience conditions through 7 built-in sensors and delivers the data to the mobile App and its 4.2-inch E-ink screen. It supports batteries or DC power supply and can be easily equipped via NFC. It features a tri-co
author: Thinger.io
